variables.input:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-7d
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, feature, "unknown")
| summarize values = collectDistinct(featureNorm)
| expand values
| sort values
| fields values

fetch bizevents, from: now()-7d
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown")
| summarize values = collectDistinct(userEmailNorm)
| expand values
| sort values
| fields values

0.content:
## Usage Tracking Dashboard
Monitor how users interact with the Business Observability Demonstrator app.

Events are emitted as `bizevents.audit.usage.*` BizEvents with fields: `json.feature`, `json.auditAction`, `json.pagePath`, `json.targetPath`, `json.userEmail`, `json.userName`.

1.title: Total Usage Events (24h)
1.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-24h
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| summarize totalEvents = count()

2.title: Active Users (24h)
2.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-24h
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown")
| filter userEmailNorm != "" and userEmailNorm != "unknown"
| summarize activeUsers = countDistinct(userEmailNorm)

3.title: Events Per Minute (24h)
3.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-24h
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| makeTimeseries events = count(), interval: 5m

4.title: Feature Activity (24h)
4.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-24h
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, json.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown")
| summarize events = count(), users = countDistinct(userEmailNorm), by: { featureNorm, actionNorm }
| sort events desc
| limit 100

5.title: Top Pages Viewed (24h)
5.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-24h
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, json.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, page, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown")
| filter startsWith(actionNorm, "view-") or featureNorm == "navigation"
| summarize views = count(), users = countDistinct(userEmailNorm), by: { pagePathNorm }
| sort views desc
| limit 50

6.title: Top Navigation Targets (24h)
6.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-24h
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, json.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, ""), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown")
| filter targetPathNorm != ""
| filter startsWith(actionNorm, "open-link-")
| summarize clicks = count(), users = countDistinct(userEmailNorm), by: { targetPathNorm }
| sort clicks desc
| limit 50

7.title: Journey Creation Activity (7d)
7.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-7d
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, json.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown")
| filter featureNorm == "journey" or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "create-journey")
| summarize created = count(), by: { userNameNorm, userEmailNorm, actionNorm }
| sort created desc
| limit 100

8.title: Dashboard Usage Activity (7d)
8.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-7d
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, json.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, page, ""), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown")
| filter pagePathNorm == "/demonstrator-dashboards" or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "dashboard")
| summarize events = count(), users = countDistinct(userEmailNorm), by: { actionNorm, pagePathNorm }
| sort events desc
| limit 100

9.title: AI / Agent-Related Activity (7d)
9.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-7d
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, json.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown")
| filter matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "ai") or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "copilot") or matchesPhrase(actionNorm, "librarian") or featureNorm == "fixit"
| summarize events = count(), by: { userNameNorm, userEmailNorm, featureNorm, actionNorm }
| sort events desc
| limit 150

10.title: Top Users by Activity (24h)
10.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-24h
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, feature, "unknown"), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown")
| summarize activity = count(), featuresUsed = countDistinct(featureNorm), by: { userNameNorm, userEmailNorm }
| sort activity desc
| limit 100

11.title: Daily Active Users Trend (30d)
11.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-30d
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown")
| filter userEmailNorm != "" and userEmailNorm != "unknown"
| makeTimeseries dau = countDistinct(userEmailNorm), interval: 1d

12.title: Data Quality: Missing User Identity (24h)
12.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-24h
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, ""), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, userName, "")
| summarize total = count(), missingEmail = countIf(userEmailNorm == "" or userEmailNorm == "unknown"), missingName = countIf(userNameNorm == "" or userNameNorm == "unknown")

13.title: Latest Usage Events (Debug, 24h)
13.query:
fetch bizevents, from: now()-24h
| filter startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.")
| filter not startsWith(event.type, "bizevents.audit.usage.feature-flag.")
| fieldsAdd featureNorm = coalesce(json.feature, feature, "unknown"), actionNorm = coalesce(json.auditAction, json.action, action, event.type, "unknown"), userNameNorm = coalesce(json.userName, userName, "unknown"), userEmailNorm = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail, "unknown"), pagePathNorm = coalesce(json.pagePath, page, ""), targetPathNorm = coalesce(json.targetPath, "")
| fields timestamp, event.type, featureNorm, actionNorm, userNameNorm, userEmailNorm, pagePathNorm, targetPathNorm
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 300
